5.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; may cause compilation error with modern compilers that remove 'gets' entirely]

14.reason: [Incorrect range check: 'z' - 'a' = 25, so <=25 is correct; <=26 includes one extra invalid character]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect range check: 'z' - 'a' = 25, so <=25 is correct; <=26 includes one extra invalid character]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Condition allows 'z'-'a'=25, but <=26 includes one extra invalid character (e.g., '{'). Should be <=25. Also, does not ensure str[i+1] is within bounds when i = len-1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect range check: 'z'-'a' is 25, so <=26 allows one extra invalid character (e.g., '{')]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [Condition (str[i-1]-'a')<=26 allows 'z'-'a'=25, but also accepts '{' (ASCII 123) which gives 26; should be <=25]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Incorrect range check: 'z' - 'a' = 25, so valid range is [0,25], not [0,26]. This may incorrectly include '{' (ASCII 123).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Same issue: <=26 is incorrect; should be <=25. Also, accesses str[i+1] without checking if i+1 < len, leading to out-of-bounds read when '-' is at the last position.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Same issue: <=26 is incorrect; should be <=25]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [Same issue: <=26 should be <=25 to restrict to 'a'-'z']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Same issue: should be <=25. Also, if i == len-1, then str[i+1] is out of bounds (accessing beyond string end).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Same error: 'Z' - 'A' = 25, so condition should be <=25]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Same logical error: <=26 should be <=25 for uppercase letters. Also, no bounds check for str[i+1].]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Same error: 'Z'-'A' is 25, so <=26 is wrong]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Same range error: should be <=25 for uppercase letters.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Same issues: incorrect range and potential out-of-bounds access.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Same range error and potential out-of-bounds access when i == len-1.]
